vocab.meaning: ngắm nhìn cảnh đẹp ngoạn mục
vocab.example: I always try to secure a window seat to behold the breathtaking scenery as we drive through the mountain pass.
Looking at the rolling hills provides me with a profound sense of tranquility during an otherwise hectic trip.
Traveling by car allows me to enjoy a panoramic view of the countryside that I would otherwise miss.

vocab.meaning: những khoảnh khắc vụt qua/thoáng qua
vocab.example: I love capturing fleeting moments of rural life through the window, even if they only last for a second.

vocab.meaning: nhìn một cách vô định/thả hồn theo cái nhìn
vocab.example: Sometimes I just gaze aimlessly out the window to let my mind wander and decompress.
I was completely mesmerized by the vibrant sunset reflecting off the coastal waters during our bus ride.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường mang nghĩa tiêu cực)
vocab.example: As we enter the city, the natural landscape is unfortunately replaced by a monotonous urban sprawl.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: Vietnam is home to many picturesque landscapes, so looking out the window is never a dull experience.
For me, observing the changing environment is an indispensable part of the overall travel experience.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ sự đơn điệu/nhàm chán
vocab.example: Watching the small villages go by really helps to break the monotony of a long-distance bus journey.
